topic.title: Home Fabric Repair Hub
topic.shortdesc: This guide explains how to repair common fabric damage, including split seams, holes in clothing, and tears in stuffed animals. Follow the concepts, tasks, and reference information to choose the best repair method and complete a successful repair.

body.p: Whether you are fixing a favorite pair of jeans or repairing a sentimental stuffed animal, these instructions will help you create a durable and neat repair.

ol.li: Read the concept topics to learn about repair options.
Review the tool checklist to gather materials.
Follow the task that matches your repair situation.
Complete the finishing steps to secure your repair.
